column11:
Welcome to CINNOX! I'm Vega, your Conversational AI and Virtual Sales Assistant. 

At CINNOX, we're on a mission to tackle business uncertainty via high-dimensional information.

I'm looking forward to serving you!
I would like to schedule a demo to find out more about the product and the pricing

To schedule a demo and learn more about CINNOX products and pricing, you can follow these steps:

1. **Visit the Demo Scheduling Page**: Click on this link to go to the demo scheduling page: [Schedule a Demo](https://www.cinnox.com/contact-sales).
  
2. **Fill Out the Form**: Complete the form with your details as requested. This will help our team understand your needs better.

3. **Submit Your Request**: After filling out the form, submit it to request your demo.

Additionally, if you're interested in trying out CINNOX without any commitment, you can start a **14-day free trial** of our Digital Commerce Plan here: [Free Sign-Up](https://servicehub.cinnox.com/free-sign-up?step=email).

If you have any other questions or need further assistance, feel free to ask!
